title: Psychomagic, A Healing Art
overview: Explores the therapeutic work of director Alejandro Jodorowsky, showing by means of real acts, what Psychomagic is, its principle, how it is practiced, and how it is applied in life. Jodorowsky works directly with real, suffering people who are eager to solve their problems.

trailers.title: PSYCHOMAGIE, UN ART POUR GUÉRIR de Alejandro Jodorowsky - Bande-Annonce (2019, VOSTFR)
Alejandro Jodorowsky's new film Psychomagic, an art that heals
